name: Stuffed Onions
recipeInstructions:
1. Skin the onions and cut them in half crosswise. Simmer in salted water until tender, then drain.
2. Remove the centers of the onions without disturbing the outer layers and chop fine.
3. Melt 2 tablespoons of butter in a skillet. Add the chopped onion, celery, and parsley and cook for a few minutes.
4. Push the vegetables to one side. Melt the remaining butter and add bread crumbs, salt, and pepper. Stir until combined.
5. Fill the onion shells with the stuffing. Cover the dish and bake in a moderate oven for about 30 minutes, or until the onions are tender.
6. Remove the cover during the last part of cooking to allow the onions to brown on top.
